evals.prompt: Search the web for recent articles about zero trust architecture best practices
evals.expected_output: Structured list of web search results with title, domain, date, URL, and snippet for each result, with dividers between entries. User should be asked which to analyze further.

evals.prompt: Research what experts and publications say about NIST AI RMF implementation challenges and give me a cited report
evals.expected_output: Deep research workflow: Firecrawl search, NotebookLM notebook creation, source addition, cited queries, generated briefing report, and results saved to Obsidian vault

evals.prompt: Cross-reference the claims in these articles about FedRAMP 20x changes: https://www.fedramp.gov/2024-09-09-a-new-era-for-fedramp/ and https://www.coalfire.com/the-coalfire-blog/fedramp-20x-what-you-need-to-know
evals.expected_output: Verify workflow: Firecrawl scrape of both URLs, NotebookLM notebook with both as sources, targeted verification questions, cited findings showing agreement/disagreement across sources
